creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Hello Dušan, thanks for your interest to pick up maintainership for this port. You will need to submit a patch against the port's Makefile in ports' SVN head, with your email address in the MAINTAINER line. For more info please consult the handbook:

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/book.html

As well as:

https://bitbucket.org/koobs/ports
